subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Wronged One, who was named Ḥusayn before 'Alí, unto thee, that it may draw thee nigh unto God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]... ...O Lord! I beseech Thee by the blood of them that love Thee which hath been shed in Thy path,and by such lamentations and cries as have been voiced by those who yearn for Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من المظلوم الذی سمی بحسین قبل علی الیک لیقربک الی الله المهیمن القیوم لاتکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital
